description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a dark, sloped roof and a rectangular skylight at its center. The exterior walls are clad in textured stone, giving it a robust and contemporary appearance. Several windows and doors are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, with larger openings on one side suggesting a garage or main entrance. The roof extends beyond the walls, creating deep overhangs that provide shade and architectural interest. The structure appears to be a single-story building, with a flat yet slightly sloped roofline. The overall look is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark, sloped roof, stone exterior, and asymmetrical windows and doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a large garage door, a smaller entry door, and several windows set in a stone wall beneath a wide, dark roof.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the roof's unique shape, central skylight, and the overhanging eaves on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, uninterrupted stone wall with minimal openings and the roof's full expanse.
description_view_3: Side view showing a single large window or door and the depth of the stone wall beneath the sloped roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door adjacent to a large garage door, both set flush within the stone facade and sheltered by a deep roof overhang.
